description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2"Upperleather upper with a peep toe and a bow on the forefoot, and has a nubuck inner lining at the back heel for absolute comfortLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable PU outsole grooved on the forefoot and has a grooved rubber heel patch for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
